Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: The Studium app is an essential companion app for all Studium Members.
Changelog:
Studium Crafters Artisan readiness:
- Unlocks Craft with Artisan after FC chest transfer completion even when personal inventory did not already satisfy the plan.
- Compares transfer completion against required withdrawal amounts, including crystal-cap skips.
Punchline: An essential companion app for all Studium members.
